title: Rich Red Polish Pasta
description: A salty and cheesy Polish dish featuring red curry paste, perfect for a date night, with an al dente finish and Mediterranean-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pappardelle pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the red curry paste to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the sour cream and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the heat and stir in the grated cheddar cheese until melted and smooth.
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the cheese sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish and top with chopped fresh parsley.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
